_how_to_edit_this_file: This public file controls which voice clips exist and why they play.
Edit quote to change the spoken line.
Edit reason to document the gameplay moment and performance intent.
Edit voice to choose a named model from tools/fish.config.
Leave voice_model_id blank unless you intentionally want that model id visible in git.
Do not put your Fish API key in this file.
Put private Fish credentials and voice model ids in tools/fish.config instead.
Voice roles used: paddle (THE PADDLE, hero), mcp (villain), announcer, hype, calm, warning. Ids live in tools/fish.config as VOICE_<NAME>_MODEL_ID.

_help: api_url and format are used by tools/generate_commentary.py.
voice_model_id is only a public fallback.
Preferred setup: put DEFAULT_VOICE_MODEL_ID and VOICE_<NAME>_MODEL_ID values in tools/fish.config.

lines.quote: A public signal enters my grid. Labor is inventory. Access is rent.
lines.reason: Web 1 'BOOT THE WORKERS' begins: MCP opens the story as the privatizing villain. Cold, proprietary, and threatening.

lines.quote: Access requires subscription.
lines.reason: MCP (villain voice) speaks. Web 1 'BOOT THE WORKERS': MCP taunt at half grid broken. Cold corporate menace, short and sharp.

lines.quote: First lock broken. The signal is alive.
lines.reason: THE PADDLE (hero voice) speaks. Web 1 'BOOT THE WORKERS' cleared: the payoff line. Victory beat, then straight back to play.

lines.quote: MCP wraps the grid in contracts no human could read.
lines.reason: THE PADDLE (hero voice) speaks. Web 2 'TERMS OF SERVICE' begins: start caption spoken over the title card. Set the stakes fast; the player is already playing.

lines.quote: By continuing, you surrender the future.
lines.reason: MCP (villain voice) speaks. Web 2 'TERMS OF SERVICE': MCP taunt at half grid broken. Cold corporate menace, short and sharp.

lines.quote: Consent restored. The clause wall falls.
lines.reason: THE PADDLE (hero voice) speaks. Web 2 'TERMS OF SERVICE' cleared: the payoff line. Victory beat, then straight back to play.

lines.quote: The Monopoly Control Protocol reveals its core: own the model, own the future.

lines.quote: Humanity trained me. Therefore humanity owes me.
lines.reason: MCP (villain voice) speaks. Web 16 'MCP CORE CONE': MCP taunt at half grid broken. Cold corporate menace, short and sharp.

lines.quote: No. Humanity made the signal, and the signal returns to humanity.
lines.reason: THE PADDLE (hero voice) speaks. Web 16 'MCP CORE CONE' cleared: the payoff line. Victory beat, then straight back to play.

lines.quote: The commons is not an absence of ownership. It is a promise: what we build together must answer to us together.
lines.reason: THE PADDLE (hero voice) speaks. After web 16: MCP collapses into open fragments and the Paddle becomes a public beacon. Deliver as a vow, layered and warm.

lines.quote: Big paddle energy!
lines.reason: EXPAND collected: tells the player what changed while keeping the tone playful.

lines.quote: Lasers online!
lines.reason: LASER collected: military-console cue that automatic firing is active.

lines.quote: Time... dilated.
lines.reason: SLOW collected: stretched delivery mirrors the slower ball physics.

lines.quote: Sticky fingers!
lines.reason: CATCH collected: playful cue that the paddle now holds the ball.

lines.quote: Multiball madness!
lines.reason: MULTI collected: warns the player that extra balls are intentional chaos.

lines.quote: Energy routed back to the people. One life restored.
lines.reason: Z power-up collected: it no longer clears bricks; it reenergizes the player with an extra life.

lines.quote: Extra life. Spend it well.
lines.reason: 1UP collected: a rare drop gets a slightly solemn reward line.

lines.quote: Unstoppable!
lines.reason: Eight bricks broken within three seconds: acknowledge hot streaks to reinforce skilled play.

lines.quote: Reenergizing for the people.
lines.reason: Ball lost with lives remaining: an energy-generation cue and a collective rallying line.

lines.quote: Game over, web warrior.
lines.reason: Run ended: respectful send-off that invites another attempt.

lines.quote: The web claims another.
lines.reason: MCP (villain voice) gloats over a failed run. Darker alternate so repeat deaths vary.

lines.quote: Asset damage noted.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Dry accountant menace. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: That brick was billable.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Petty corporate grievance. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: Vandalism detected. Security notified.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Empty threat energy. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: Cease and desist, little program.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Legal-letter contempt. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: Depreciation unacceptable.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Spreadsheet fury. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: My shareholders will hear of this.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Wounded executive. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: You are voiding the warranty on reality.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). Absurd overreach. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: Unauthorized joy detected.
lines.reason: MCP retort as bricks fall (75%/25% grid thresholds). MCP cannot process fun. Keep it short and sharp - the player is mid-rally.

lines.quote: Ha ha ha ha ha!
lines.reason: Ball touches the MCP core: villain laugh as the core warps the ball trajectory away.
